people.photoError: Couldn't read that image. Try a PNG, JPEG, WebP or GIF.
people.removeFieldBody: Deleting the "{{label}}" field removes it — and its saved data — for every person. Do you want to just clear its value for this person instead?
people.noCustomFields: No custom fields yet. Fields you add here appear on every person.

calendar.imported_one: Imported {{count}} event into the built-in calendar.
calendar.imported_other: Imported {{count}} events into the built-in calendar.

demo.title: Load demo data?
demo.body: You found the secret! This will permanently delete all of your current events, reminders, to-dos, notes, lists, tags, and links, then fill the app with a sample dataset to explore.

settings.title: Settings
settings.storedLocally: Configuration is stored locally on this device.

general.title: General
general.description: Choose how the app is displayed. Your language preference is stored on this device.
general.languageHint: Dates, times and the first day of the week follow the selected language. Demo data is only available in English.
general.weatherHint: Shows the forecast on your Today page. Weather data by Open-Meteo.com — no account needed, and the location is only sent when a forecast is fetched. Leave empty to turn the weather off.
general.weatherPlaceholder: Search for a town or city…
general.placeSearchFailed: Couldn't search for places just now. Check your connection and try again.
general.watchlistHint: Symbols shown on the Today page. Quotes come from Yahoo Finance, which needs no account — but it's an undocumented endpoint, so it may stop working without warning.
general.symbolSearchFailed: Couldn't search for symbols just now.
general.watchlistFull: A watchlist holds up to {{count}} symbols.

voice.description: Talk to the assistant and it replies aloud; type and it replies in text. Voice uses the same tools as the chat, so it can answer questions and make changes.
voice.rateHint: How fast replies are read out, from half speed to double. Applies to both engines. Preview to hear it.
voice.engineHintOpenai: Uses OpenAI's neural voices with your existing API key. Much more natural than the built-in voices, and steered towards Taiwanese Mandarin for Chinese replies. Billed per character (roughly a cent a minute) and needs an internet connection — replies fall back to a system voice automatically when it's unavailable.
voice.engineHintSystem: Uses the voices installed on this Mac. Works offline and sends nothing over the network, but sounds noticeably more synthetic.
voice.naturalHint: One voice reads both English and Chinese. If it can't be reached, the best installed system voice takes over automatically. Preview costs a fraction of a cent.
voice.naturalFailed: Natural voices are unavailable, so replies used a system voice instead. {{detail}}
voice.voiceHint: macOS uses a basic voice unless a better one is installed. Enhanced and Premium voices sound far more natural and are a free download in System Settings › Accessibility › Spoken Content › System Voice › Manage Voices.
voice.privacyNote: Voice input sends audio to OpenAI for transcription (billed per minute). Spoken replies are generated locally by your OS, so they're free and work offline. The microphone is only available in a packaged build.
voice.privacyNoteOpenai: Voice input sends audio to OpenAI for transcription (billed per minute), and natural voices send the text of each spoken reply to OpenAI to be read aloud (billed per character). Both leave this device. Switch to System voices to keep spoken replies local, offline and free. The microphone is only available in a packaged build.
voice.noVoice: Your Mac has no speech voice installed for {{language}}, so replies in that language will be silent. Add one in System Settings › Accessibility › Spoken Content › System Voice › Manage Voices.

assistant.description: Answer questions and make changes with an AI assistant. Use your own OpenAI API key, or run a model locally with Ollama. Either way, configuration stays on this device.
assistant.providerHint: Choose where the assistant's text model runs. Voice input always uses OpenAI.
assistant.apiKeyHint: Get a key at platform.openai.com. Usage is billed to your own OpenAI account.
assistant.modelHint: Any chat-completions model your key can access, e.g.
assistant.baseUrlHint: Where your local Ollama server is listening. Run it with `ollama serve`.
assistant.unreachable: Can't reach Ollama at {{url}}. Make sure it's running (`ollama serve`).
assistant.ollamaModelHint: A tools-capable model is required, e.g. llama3.1 or qwen2.5.
assistant.toolsNote: The assistant relies on tool calling to read and edit your data. Pick a model that supports tools (llama3.1, qwen2.5, mistral-nemo…) — a model without tool support won't be able to answer.
assistant.summaryThrottleLabel: Keep the written briefing for a while
assistant.summaryThrottleHint: The Today page's “Your day” card is the only thing the app writes without being asked. Holding it means a change to your day — ticking off a todo, adding an event — won't rewrite it until it's this old. The refresh button on the card always rewrites it.

calendars.description: Connect iCloud to see your Apple calendars alongside the built-in one. Events are read from and written to iCloud live — nothing is copied to this device, so Apple calendars need a connection to appear.
calendars.passwordHint: Your regular Apple password won't work with two-factor authentication. Create an app-specific password under Sign-In and Security, then paste it here.
calendars.confirmDisconnect: Disconnect this iCloud account? Your local calendar is untouched.
calendars.visibleHint: Uncheck a calendar to hide it from the Calendar and Today views.
calendars.connectPrompt: Connect an account above to add more calendars.
calendars.noneFound: No Apple event calendars were found on this account.
calendars.defaultHint: New events land here when you don't pick a calendar — including events the assistant creates. The built-in {{calendar}} calendar is the only one that works offline.

data.title: Data
data.description: Back up everything the app holds for you to a single file, or restore from one. Your OpenAI key and iCloud account are excluded — they stay on this device only.
data.exportHint: Saves all your events, reminders, to-dos, notes, people, lists, tags and links to a JSON file.
data.importHint: Restore from a backup file. This replaces everything currently in the app — your OpenAI key and iCloud connection are left untouched.
data.confirmImport: Importing will replace ALL current data in the app with the contents of the backup file. This cannot be undone. Continue?
data.errorInvalid: That file isn't a valid Sekunda backup.
data.errorNewer: This backup was made by a newer version of Sekunda. Update the app before restoring it.
data.resetHint: Permanently delete all your events, reminders, to-dos, notes, people, lists, tags and links. Your OpenAI key and iCloud connection are left untouched. Export a backup first if you might want this data back.
data.confirmReset: This permanently deletes ALL data in the app — every event, reminder, to-do, note, person, list and tag. This cannot be undone. Continue?

todos.confirmDeleteList: Delete list "{{name}}"? Its tasks move to another list.
todos.confirmDeleteTask: Delete task "{{title}}"? Any subtasks are removed too.
todos.empty: No tasks in this list yet.
todos.convertedToEvent: Created a calendar event from this task.
todos.offlineSave: You're offline — changes can't be saved until you reconnect.
todos.saveFailed: Couldn't save that. Please try again.

reminders.notificationsOff: Notifications are disabled. Enable them in System Settings to get reminder alerts.

event.readOnly: This calendar is read-only, so the event can't be changed here.
event.calendarLocked: To move an event to another calendar, delete it and create it again there.
event.localOnlyMeta: Tags, people and links are available on events in the built-in {{calendar}} calendar only.

today.layoutHint: Use the arrows to reorder your cards, or the eye to hide one. Hidden cards stop loading their data.
today.cardCrashed: This card ran into a problem. The rest of the page is fine.
today.summaryFailed: Couldn't write a summary just now.
today.noBirthdays: No birthdays in the next 30 days.

search.prompt: Type in the search box above.
search.calendarsUnavailable: Couldn’t reach {{names}} — those results are missing.

md.videoHint: Paste a YouTube link or its embed code — it shows in preview.
md.videoInvalid: That doesn't look like a YouTube link.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.needKey: Set up the assistant in Settings — add an OpenAI API key or connect a local Ollama model — to ask questions about your events, to-dos, reminders, and notes.
assistant.voiceNeedsKey: Voice input needs an OpenAI API key (transcription runs on OpenAI). The text assistant works without one. Add a key in Settings.
assistant.emptyPrompt: Ask me anything about your data — type below or tap the mic to talk. For example:
assistant.suggestion3: Add a to-do to call the dentist tomorrow at 2pm
assistant.suggestion4: Create a Work note titled 'Sprint goals'
assistant.micUnavailable: Voice input isn't available in this environment — the webview doesn't expose microphone access. Try a packaged build, or check the platform's media permissions.
assistant.micDenied: Couldn't access the microphone. Check the app's microphone permission.
assistant.talkHint: Talk to the assistant, or hold Space
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask about your calendar, tasks, notes…
assistant.listeningHint: Listening… tap the mic to stop
assistant.listeningHintSpace: Listening… release the SPACE bar to stop
assistant.tagline: Asks and edits · works on your data
assistant.popupEmpty: Ask about your day without leaving this page.
assistant.popupCrashed: The chat window ran into a problem. Close and reopen it, or open the Assistant page.

errors.noApiKey: No OpenAI API key set. Add one in Settings.
errors.notConfigured: The assistant isn't set up yet. Choose a provider in Settings — an OpenAI key or a local Ollama model.
errors.tooManySteps: The assistant took too many steps without answering. Try rephrasing your question.
errors.ollamaUnreachable: Can't reach Ollama at {{url}}. Make sure it's running (`ollama serve`).

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to reach your data on any device.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to sync across your devices.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
auth.noRecoveryWarning: There is no password reset yet — if you forget this password, the account can't be recovered.
auth.offline: You're offline. Connect to the internet to sign in.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
